campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: Campbell's City Council met to discuss and vote on changes to business license tax rates for the upcoming fiscal year. Shannon Dragman from the Finance Department presented the proposed updates to the tax rates, and the council had a public discussion before making a final decision.
keyTopics: Business license tax rate increases for fiscal year 2026
Finance Department's annual tax rate review and recommendations
Public council deliberation and voting on the ordinance changes
Updates to Campbell Municipal Code regarding business taxes

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026, where residents could comment on a new rule or policy. After hearing public input, the council moved forward with introducing the ordinance and skipped the usual first reading step to speed up the process, with plans to finalize it at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held to gather resident feedback
New ordinance introduced and expedited through first reading
Ordinance scheduled for final adoption at next regular council meeting
Process streamlined using consent calendar procedure

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026, to approve meeting records from their previous session and review the city's finances for February. They also authorized the Town Manager to sign several contracts for construction work and professional services.
keyTopics: Approved previous meeting minutes and financial records
Authorized construction contracts with multiple companies
Approved a three-year professional services agreement
Town improvements project planning

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 27, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council met to review how the city is progressing on its planning and development goals halfway through 2026. They checked in on major events happening in the city, the economic strategy to attract businesses and jobs, and overall progress on citywide planning projects.
keyTopics: Halfway check-in on 2026 planning and development projects
Status of major events scheduled for San José this year
Economic growth strategy and business development efforts
Team San José performance and initiatives

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 27, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a meeting on April 27, 2026 that allowed residents to participate both in-person and online via Zoom. Residents wanting to speak during the meeting could join the video call or phone line and use the raise hand feature to request time to comment on specific agenda items.
keyTopics: Virtual meeting access via Zoom for public participation
Procedures for residents to provide public comment
Phone dial-in option for those without internet access

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 27, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special evening meeting on April 27, 2026, to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents were able to participate both in person and online to watch the interviews and provide public comments.
keyTopics: Board and Commission candidate interviews
Public comment opportunities for residents
In-person and online participation options

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 27, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held an Audit Committee meeting where residents were invited to speak about any city matters for up to three minutes each. The committee approved minutes from their January meeting and reviewed how well the city's retirement and healthcare trust funds performed during the first quarter of 2026.
keyTopics: Public comment period on city matters
Approval of January 26 meeting minutes
Retirement and healthcare trust fund performance (Q1 2026)
OPEB & Pension Section 115 Trust investments

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss putting up large promotional signs around Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, though this item was withdrawn before a vote. The council also approved a new labor agreement with the city's firefighters union covering 2026 through 2029.
keyTopics: Large promotional signs planned around Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026 (item withdrawn)
New 3-year contract agreement with Santa Clara firefighters union
Temporary signage authorization during FIFA World Cup special events

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held meetings on April 21, 2026 to discuss several important financial and community matters. They reviewed tax regulations, approved the city budget for the next fiscal year, updated various fees and services, and heard a presentation about efforts to address homelessness in Santa Clara County.
keyTopics: Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act reissuance
FY 2026-27 city budget and development fees approval
User fees and service charges updates
County homelessness prevention initiatives
Approval of previous meeting minutes and next meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 23, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council reviewed a request to reconsider a tree removal permit that was already approved for a property at 751 Waverley Street. Someone is asking the Planning Director to take another look at the decision to allow protected trees to be removed from this location.
keyTopics: Protected tree removal permit at 751 Waverley Street
Request to have Planning Director review an already-approved permit
Over-the-counter planning entitlement process
